MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-20-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY THE COURT SHOULD NOT ISSUE A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY MET THE REQUIREMENTS FOR THE ISSUANCE OF A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. POS INDICATES THAT KEYHAN MOHANNA AS INDIVIDUAL AND TRUSTEE HAVE BEEN SERVED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT NOTES THAT ON NOVEMBER 1, 2017 PLAINTIFF OBTAINED AN ORDER ALLOWING A DOE AMENDMENT, HOWEVER NO DOE AMENDMENT HAS BEEN FILED OR SERVED. THIS INJUNCTION IS THEREFORE ISSUED ONLY AGAINST THE NAMED DEFENDANTS IN THE OCTOBER 5, 2017 COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Order To Show Cause Why The Court Should Not Issue A Preliminary Injuntion
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bao M. Vu, esq. (415-617-8900) of Stoel Rives for Plaintiff/Moving party Deutsche Bank National Trust Company.
No other appearances.

Not Argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Why The Court Should Not Issue A Preliminary Injunction is GRANTED. Moving party met the requirements for the issuance of a preliminary injunction. POS indicates that Keyhan Mohanna as individual and trustee have been served. No opposition filed. The Court notes that on November 1, 2017 Plaintiff obtained an order allowing a Doe Amendment, however no Doe amendment has been filed or served. This Injunction is therefore issued only against the named defendants in the October 5, 2017 complaint. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
